propositions: Enable verify.completion_floor_active in this project's rebar.toml to dogfood the completion floor on live reviews while the schema default stays False for clients.
The completion floor is fully implemented and calibrated (gold-set closed, 30/30 floor decisions correct) but has never been switched on.
Document how to audit completion-floor suppressions via the plan-review sidecar dropped[] entries tagged drop_reason="completion" so wrongly-suppressed findings are recoverable.
Optionally add a per-drop logger.info line at the suppression site since the successful-drop path currently logs nothing.
Change is config activation plus monitoring only with no logic change; the floor is advisory and cannot alter a PASS/BLOCK verdict, and rollback is setting the key back to false.
Verify a re-fired plan-review runs the floor and that lint, typecheck, and existing floor tests stay green.
